list.name: Changes
list.comment:
feat(auth): enhance authentication flow with session management via cookies
- Replaced localStorage session management with HttpOnly cookies for increased security. - Implemented new `/auth/session` and `/auth/logout` endpoints for session synchronization. - Updated API client to handle session-based user retrieval and logout actions. - Modified frontend authentication logic to use session cookies and save user data in `sessionStorage`. - Enhanced backend to set and clear access cookies securely. - Added Helmet and updated CORS configuration for improved security. - Refined error handling and improved user state synchronization across the application.

task.summary:
chore: add IDE config files, update fonts, and refine global styles formatting
- Introduced new `.idea` config files for project-specific settings. - Updated font assets and standardized typography tokens across the project. - Enhanced LogsPage for improved structure and markdown rendering. - Refined global styles and component variants for error handling and improved UX.

feat(admin): implement dynamic admin dashboard components and enhance UI
- Introduced reusable chart components (`ChartContainer`, `ChartTooltipContent`, etc.) for admin dashboard. - Implemented new charts: `QueryVolumeChart`, `DailyActivityChart`, and `DocumentStatusDistributionChart` for usage metrics. - Added `InteractivePieChart` for interactive data visualization. - Created `RecentFeedbacksTable` to display admin feedback with improved UI semantics. - Developed a new `Select` component for enhanced dropdown functionality.

feat: implement custom Avatar and Drawer components, enhance admin layout, and add profile management
- Added `Avatar` and `Drawer` components with Radix primitives for modular UI. - Enhanced `AdminLayout` with a profile management drawer. - Introduced `ProfileDrawer` for updating passwords and viewing user details. - Improved localization and updated numerous labels, tooltips, and UI texts. - Implemented backend use case for password updates with validation logic.

feat(chat): add GSAP animations to enhance MessageBubble and ChatPage UI
- Integrated GSAP and `@gsap/react` for interactive animations. - Added message bubble animations on loading and error states. - Introduced hero section animations and proactive tips float effect in ChatPage. - Updated dependencies to include GSAP and `@gsap/react`.

feat(auth): enhance authentication flow with session management via cookies
- Replaced localStorage session management with HttpOnly cookies for increased security. - Implemented new `/auth/session` and `/auth/logout` endpoints for session synchronization. - Updated API client to handle session-based user retrieval and logout actions. - Modified frontend authentication logic to use session cookies and save user data in `sessionStorage`. - Enhanced backend to set and clear access cookies securely. - Added Helmet and updated CORS configuration for improved security. - Refined error handling and improved user state synchronization across the application.

MESSAGE.value:
chore: add IntelliJ IDEA configuration files and update logs page design with markdown support
- Added `.idea` folder for project-specific IDE settings. - Enhanced LogsPage component with improved markdown rendering and updated UI elements for better clarity. - Updated badge variants with new "error" style for consistent status indicators.

chore: add IDE config files, update fonts, and refine global styles formatting
- Introduced new `.idea` config files for project-specific settings. - Updated font assets and standardized typography tokens across the project. - Enhanced LogsPage for improved structure and markdown rendering. - Refined global styles and component variants for error handling and improved UX.

feat(admin): implement dynamic admin dashboard components and enhance UI
- Introduced reusable chart components (`ChartContainer`, `ChartTooltipContent`, etc.) for admin dashboard. - Implemented new charts: `QueryVolumeChart`, `DailyActivityChart`, and `DocumentStatusDistributionChart` for usage metrics. - Added `InteractivePieChart` for interactive data visualization. - Created `RecentFeedbacksTable` to display admin feedback with improved UI semantics. - Developed a new `Select` component for enhanced dropdown functionality.

feat: implement custom Avatar and Drawer components, enhance admin layout, and add profile management
- Added `Avatar` and `Drawer` components with Radix primitives for modular UI. - Enhanced `AdminLayout` with a profile management drawer. - Introduced `ProfileDrawer` for updating passwords and viewing user details. - Improved localization and updated numerous labels, tooltips, and UI texts. - Implemented backend use case for password updates with validation logic.

feat(chat): add GSAP animations to enhance MessageBubble and ChatPage UI
- Integrated GSAP and `@gsap/react` for interactive animations. - Added message bubble animations on loading and error states. - Introduced hero section animations and proactive tips float effect in ChatPage. - Updated dependencies to include GSAP and `@gsap/react`.

feat(auth): enhance authentication flow with session management via cookies
- Replaced localStorage session management with HttpOnly cookies for increased security. - Implemented new `/auth/session` and `/auth/logout` endpoints for session synchronization. - Updated API client to handle session-based user retrieval and logout actions. - Modified frontend authentication logic to use session cookies and save user data in `sessionStorage`. - Enhanced backend to set and clear access cookies securely. - Added Helmet and updated CORS configuration for improved security. - Refined error handling and improved user state synchronization across the application.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
feat(auth): enhance authentication flow with session management via cookies
- Replaced localStorage session management with HttpOnly cookies for increased security. - Implemented new `/auth/session` and `/auth/logout` endpoints for session synchronization. - Updated API client to handle session-based user retrieval and logout actions. - Modified frontend authentication logic to use session cookies and save user data in `sessionStorage`. - Enhanced backend to set and clear access cookies securely. - Added Helmet and updated CORS configuration for improved security. - Refined error handling and improved user state synchronization across the application.
